title: Product Engineer / Manufacturing Engineer (North / North-east)
description:
Position 1: Product Engineer

Location: North

Industry: Manufacturing (Various)

About the Role
Are you passionate about turning ideas into innovative products? We are looking for a skilled Product Engineer to lead product development, experimentation, and improvement initiatives. You will play a critical role in developing new and enhanced products while ensuring quality, compliance, and manufacturability.

Key Responsibilities

  • Product Development & Experimentation: Plan and conduct experiments for new products or modifications. Develop test methods, analyze results, and document findings.

  • Customer & Supplier Collaboration: Liaise with customers regarding product issues. Evaluate raw materials and components from suppliers, approve usage based on test results.

  • Process & Technology Improvement: Develop and optimize processes for new products. Conduct technology scouting to identify improvements and innovative solutions.

  • Documentation & Compliance: Prepare technical reports, test protocols, and documentation for internal and customer approvals (SAP, technical documents).

  • Problem Solving & Quality Management: Investigate product or process issues, perform root cause analysis (e.g., DOE, FMEA), and recommend corrective actions.

  • Pilot Production Support: Oversee pilot runs, monitor production parameters, and collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure smooth product introduction.

Requirements

  • Degree in Mechanical, Materials, or related Engineering discipline

  • 2–3 years’ experience in product or process development

  • Proficient in SAP, CAD/Creo, MS Project, and MS Office

  • Strong analytical skills and attention to detail

  • Good command of English and strong communication skills

Position 2: Manufacturing Engineer

Location: North-east

Industry: Manufacturing (Electro-mechanical)

About the Role
We are seeking a Manufacturing Engineer to lead the design and optimization of manufacturing processes for diverse products. You will provide technical guidance, manage process development, and ensure efficient production operations.

Key Responsibilities

  • New Production Introduction: Lead manufacturing process development, tool design, scheduling, cost analysis, and supplier technical support.

  • Technical Leadership: Oversee manufacturing processes for cables, harnesses, and electro-mechanical assemblies, including inspection, testing, and assembly guidance.

  • Process Optimization & Problem Solving: Analyze production challenges and implement innovative engineering solutions. Conduct rationalization and cost-reduction initiatives.

  • Documentation & Compliance: Prepare and maintain process documentation, assembly instructions, drawings, and specifications to support production and quality systems.

  • Project Management: Manage multiple priorities under tight deadlines, ensuring projects are completed successfully and efficiently.

Requirements

  • Diploma or Degree in Mechanical, Electrical, or related Engineering discipline

  • 2–5 years’ experience in manufacturing engineering or related field

  • Strong knowledge of manufacturing processes, tools, and quality testing

  • Proficient in Microsoft Excel, MS Office, and relevant engineering software

  • Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to handle multiple priorities

To Apply, kindly click on the "APPLY NOW" button.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

StaffKing Pte Ltd (20C0358) | Chong Kar Ming (John) (R21101412)

postedCompany.description:
Since our humble beginnings as a two-person team in 2021, StaffKing has grown into a trusted recruitment partner with a dynamic team of around 30 professionals and a portfolio of over 500 active clients. Our mission remains clear: to deliver exceptional employment services that empower businesses to grow with the right talent.

We pride ourselves on the speed and precision of our recruitment process—surfacing high-quality, well-matched profiles quickly to meet the fast-paced demands of today’s business landscape. Whether it’s permanent, contract, part-time, temporary staffing, or mass recruitment drives, we understand that the right hire makes all the difference.

At StaffKing, we are driven by a culture of elevating lives—not just for the candidates we help find meaningful careers, but also for our own team. Through our expertise in talent acquisition, we empower businesses by connecting them with the right people who drive success, innovation, and growth. With StaffKing, you’re not just filling a role—you’re investing in a team that moves your business forward.
